name: dep-chain-3
code: (begin (set-code "(define (f x) (+ x 1))(define (g x) (f x))(define (h x) (g x))")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "f" "(lambda (x) (* x 2))" "v2")(typecheck-current)(eval-current)(display (h 5)))

name: dep-chain-5
code: (begin (set-code "(define (a x) (+ x 1))(define (b x) (a x))(define (c x) (b x))(define (d x) (c x))(define (e x) (d x))")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "a" "(lambda (x) (* x 2))" "v2")(typecheck-current)(eval-current)(display (e 5)))

name: dep-repeat-mutate
code: (begin (set-code "(define (f x) (+ x 1))(define (g x) (f x))")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "f" "(lambda (x) (* x 2))" "v1")(typecheck-current)(mutate:rebind "f" "(lambda (x) (- x 1))" "v2")(typecheck-current)(eval-current)(display (g 5)))

name: dep-set-body
code: (begin (set-code "(define (add x y) (+ x y))(define (calc x) (add x 1))")(typecheck-current)(mutate:set-body "add" "(* x y)")(typecheck-current)(eval-current)(display (calc 5)))
